stemHtml: For a turbojet aircraft, what is the difference between range and endurance speeds? Maximum range is flown at...

options.a: V<sub>MD</sub> minimum drag speed and maximum endurance is flown at 1.32 V<sub>MD</sub>.
options.b: V<sub>MP</sub> minimum power speed and maximum endurance is flown at 1.32 V<sub>MP</sub>.
options.c: 1.32 V<sub>MP</sub> minimum power speed and maximum endurance is flown at V<sub>MP</sub>.
options.d: 1.32 V<sub>MD</sub> minimum drag speed and maximum endurance is flown at V<sub>MD</sub>.
